Services

What we build when you hire us.

Six disciplines we ship at a senior level. We don't sell anything we wouldn't deploy in our own businesses — and most of these, we have.

01

AI Consulting

The diagnostic-first approach to AI strategy.

Timeline
30 days
Investment
From ₹3L (fixed)
02

Automation Engineering

Make your existing tools talk. Stop hiring for what software can do.

Timeline
6–12 weeks
Investment
From ₹2L/month retainer
03

Funnel Building

High-conversion funnels. B2B and D2C. Engineered, not designed.

Timeline
4–8 weeks
Investment
From ₹3L retainer + ad spend (separate)
04

AI Agents

Voice and text agents that close, qualify, and follow up.

Timeline
4–10 weeks
Investment
Project-based or per-minute
05

GEO / AEO Strategy

Get cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews.

Timeline
Ongoing retainer
Investment
From ₹2L/month
06

Outcome Engineering

We work on outcomes. You pay when it works.

Timeline
6–12 month engagements
Investment
Variable / negotiated
